underlying_goal: Complete a git rebase with conflict resolution, then verify correctness via code review and full test suite, and commit/push the result
friction_detail: Claude dropped includes and introduced std::string-as-bool/undeclared-variable bugs during conflict resolution, requiring user to point out the missing compile step, and the final force-push was denied by the permission system.
brief_summary: User wanted to rebase a branch, resolve conflicts correctly, verify via review and tests, and push; Claude resolved conflicts and fixed regressions to pass all tests, but the final force-push had to be run manually by the user.
